nasb.text: And his head was brought on a platter and given to the girl, and she brought it to her mother.

esv.text: and his head was brought on a platter and given to the girl, and she brought it to her mother.

cnv.text: 把頭放在盤子上，拿來給那女孩子，她又帶給母親。

ccb.text: 放在盘子里送给她，她转送给她母亲。

csbs.text: 把他的头放在盘子上，端给女孩，女孩就拿去给她母亲。
